name: Harford County Sch Bus Contrs
officers: Steve Nelson (President; also owner of Nelson Bus Company, Forest Hill MD)
registry_source: Maryland General Assembly testimony filings; MSBCA member roster; HCPS contractor listing
notes: no USDOT; NOT a single operating carrier - this is the HARFORD COUNTY SCHOOL BUS CONTRACTORS ASSOCIATION, a trade/advocacy association representing the ~408 contractor-owned-and-operated school buses serving Harford County Public Schools; president is Steve Nelson (Nelson Bus Company, 522/524 Chestnut Hill Rd, Forest Hill MD 21050), who is also president of MSBCA; the listed address 3762 Level Village Rd is actually Havre de Grace MD 21078 (a residential property in Harford County), likely a board-member home-address; no SDAT entity record located via public search; the association as such has no fleet/drivers/USDOT; useful only as a trade-group contact node, not a tuck-in target. Real tuck-in candidates are the individual member contractors (Nelson Bus Co., etc.)
